title: Hornet Removal in Rye, NY | $350-$550
metaDescription: Professional hornet removal services in Rye, Westchester. Safe, effective hornet nest elimination for homes and businesses. Call Best Pest Control NYC today!
intro: Dealing with aggressive hornets on your Rye property? Best Pest Control NYC provides fast, professional hornet removal services throughout Rye and Westchester County. Our certified technicians safely eliminate hornet nests from residential and commercial properties, protecting your family and neighbors from these potentially dangerous stinging insects.
whyUs: Best Pest Control NYC brings over a decade of experience serving Rye homeowners and businesses with safe, effective hornet removal solutions. We offer same-day service, competitive pricing between $350-$550, and a satisfaction guarantee that ensures your property remains hornet-free.
localContext: From the historic estates along Boston Post Road to the beautiful waterfront properties near Rye Town Park and Playland, hornet nests can pose serious risks to residents and visitors alike. Rye's tree-lined neighborhoods and older homes with eaves and attics provide ideal nesting sites for hornets, making professional removal essential for your safety.

faqs.question: How quickly can you remove a hornet nest in Rye?
faqs.answer: We offer same-day and next-day hornet removal service throughout Rye and Westchester County. Once you contact us, we'll schedule an appointment within 24 hours in most cases, as we understand the urgency and safety concerns associated with hornet infestations.

faqs.question: What's included in the $350-$550 hornet removal price?
faqs.answer: Our pricing includes a thorough inspection, complete nest removal, treatment of the affected area to prevent re-infestation, and safe disposal of the nest. The final cost depends on factors like nest size, location accessibility, and height requirements for removal.

faqs.question: Are hornets common in Rye, NY?
faqs.answer: Yes, Rye's suburban setting with mature trees, gardens, and older architectural features creates ideal conditions for hornets. Bald-faced hornets and European hornets are particularly common in Westchester County, typically building nests in trees, under eaves, and in attics during spring and summer months.

faqs.question: Is hornet removal safe for my family and pets?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. Our licensed technicians use professional-grade equipment and EPA-approved treatments to safely remove hornet nests. We take precautions to protect your family, pets, and property throughout the removal process, and provide clear instructions for any temporary safety measures needed during treatment.
